mood: wide, sunburned, nocturnal, and contemplative, like a desert instrument listening after midnight
lighting: low nocturnal sidelight with a warm afterimage glow; pale arcs catch light like drawn wire against a deep red field
object_inventory: one dominant half-dome astrolabe made from nested chalk and ochre arcs
two secondary forms: a low smoked-obsidian horizon bar and a small brushed-aluminum lens moon
large uninterrupted vermilion negative space above and around the instrument
tiny etched labels, pinholes, notches, and constellation ticks used as quiet source anchors
subtle album-cover texture: flat red ground, hand-drawn imperfect arcs, sparse lettering
negative_constraints: no desks, dashboards, software UI, cards, windows, shelves, cabinets, corridors, gates, or office interiors
do not crowd the plate with props; maintain at least 45 percent calm negative space
only one dominant form plus two secondary forms
avoid literal screenshots, logos, page chrome, code, implementation language, or social media layouts
keep technical and research concepts translated into physical marks, labels, cuts, apertures, and small lights
no equal-weight grid of source objects
